description_long: This is a spiral-shaped baked muffin with a golden-brown exterior and a slightly glossy finish, resembling a classic cinnamon roll. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible swirls and a few scattered white sugar crystals embedded in the dough. The muffin appears dense and moist, with a thick, rolled structure that rises to a rounded peak at the center. There are no visible wrappers or decorative elements apart from the sugar topping. The coloration transitions from a light tan at the base to a deeper brown at the top, indicating a well-baked crust. The object is shown isolated against a plain background, with no visible support or placement context.
description: A golden-brown, spiral muffin with a glossy finish and scattered white sugar crystals, resembling a cinnamon roll. The surface is textured and dense, with no visible wrapper or extra decorations.
description_view_0: The spiral structure and sugar crystals are most visible, with the muffin's peak and swirled layers clearly defined.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the rounded, thick base and the gradual rise of the spiral, with fewer sugar crystals visible.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the smooth, curved side and the height of the muffin, with the spiral less pronounced.
description_view_3: The back view shows a darker, more baked section of the crust and a subtle swirl, with some sugar crystals on top.
